synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2025-20919 Oracle Linux 9 buildah bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20919
description:
[1.41.4-3.0.1]
- Drop nmap-ncat requirement and skip ignore-socket test case [Orabug: 34117178]

[2:1.41.4-3]
- fix the TMT tests
- Related: RHEL-115166

[2:1.41.4-2]
- rebuild as last build was built in the wrong tag
- Related: RHEL-115166

[2:1.41.4-1]
- update to the latest content of https://github.com/containers/buildah/tree/release-1.41
  (https://github.com/containers/buildah/commit/ee5b574)
- fixes "buildah: create parent directories of mount targets with mode 0755 - [RHEL-9.7]  0day"
- Resolves: RHEL-115166
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-20919

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20919.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
buildah-1.41.4-3.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm
buildah-tests-1.41.4-3.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
buildah-1.41.4-3.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm
buildah-tests-1.41.4-3.0.1.el9_7.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/buildah-1.41.4-3.0.1.el9_7.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[1.41.4-3.0.1]
- Drop nmap-ncat requirement and skip ignore-socket test case [Orabug: 34117178]

[2:1.41.4-3]
- fix the TMT tests
- Related: RHEL-115166

[2:1.41.4-2]
- rebuild as last build was built in the wrong tag
- Related: RHEL-115166

[2:1.41.4-1]
- update to the latest content of https://github.com/containers/buildah/tree/release-1.41
  (https://github.com/containers/buildah/commit/ee5b574)
- fixes "buildah: create parent directories of mount targets with mode 0755 - [RHEL-9.7]  0day"
- Resolves: RHEL-115166
